text:
Created attachment 196849
Proposed patch (since 475857 revision)

Patch to update editors/focuswriter port from 1.6.15 to 1.6.16 version.

Look following links for changes:
https://github.com/gottcode/focuswriter/compare/v1.6.15...v1.6.16
https://github.com/gottcode/focuswriter/blob/v1.6.16/ChangeLog#L1-L4

The build was tested on FreeBSD 10.4 amd64.
